support_text: We're experiencing issues with our API requests timing out. This is causing major delays in our pipeline and impacting our production environment.
The new dashboard layout is terrible! It's taking me twice as long to find the info I need. Can you please go back to the old design?
We've been overcharged by $500 due to a mistake in our subscription plan. Please adjust our invoice ASAP.
Our custom integration with Salesforce is not working as expected. Can you please provide guidance on how to resolve this?
I'm unable to log in to the platform after updating our company's password policy. Please help!
Our production database has become corrupted, causing data loss and affecting our business operations.
The search function in the app is not working. We have thousands of records and this is making it impossible to find what we need.
Your API documentation is outdated and unclear. Can you please update it with more examples and clear instructions?
We're experiencing an outage in our platform. Please notify our users ASAP.
We need a feature to integrate with Google Sheets for data export. Can you please add this?
Your error reporting system is not capturing the detailed error messages we need.
Our API requests are taking too long to process, causing delays in our workflow. Please optimize your servers ASAP.
The new app update is causing the UI to freeze on certain devices. This is impacting our productivity.
We're experiencing issues migrating our data from the old platform to your new one.
We've identified a potential security vulnerability in your platform. Please investigate and provide a fix ASAP.
Our users are unable to log in after updating their passwords. Can you please assist?
Your API documentation is not clear on how to handle errors. Can you please provide more examples?
We need a feature to automate report generation based on our data. Can you please add this?
Your error reporting system is not capturing the correct error messages we need.
We're experiencing issues with API requests timing out due to high latency. Can you please optimize your servers?
